## Patient dosing summary

| Patient | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose (mg)* | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |
|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|

| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |

\*Calculated dose = weight × dose per kg; values shown are unrounded.

## Quick assessment

- All three patient records are present and complete in the current dosing file.
- No obvious missing fields or internal inconsistencies in the dosing parameters.
- Patient status notes are generally reassuring for CU-001 and CU-002; CU-003 is newly enrolled.

## PK model stability note

Based on the dosing config alone, nothing looks obviously out of bounds in the current parameters. However, this file by itself is **not sufficient to confirm overall PK model stability**. A real stability check would require recent model outputs, validation/QC logs, or monitoring results.", recipients="")]
